message:
fix(cli): Improve CLI commands and clipboard handling

Fix issues in CLI command handlers including collections, help, and
search commands. Improve clipboard operations and registry loader
reliability.

- Fix collections.ts command routing
- Improve help.ts output formatting
- Update search.ts result handling
- Enhance clipboard.ts with better error handling
- Fix registry-loader.ts initialization
- Update card.test.tsx assertions
- Minor jfp.ts entrypoint improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -395,7 +395,7 @@ cli
 cli
   .command("completion", "Generate shell completion script")
   .option("--shell <shell>", "Shell: bash, zsh, or fish")
-  .action((options) => completionCommand(options, cli));
+  .action((options) => completionCommand(options));
 
 cli
   .command("serve", "Start MCP server for agent-native access")
